title: Pebble's Rudimentary Commands
description: Useful commands that all servers need like /hat /heal and message utility command /r
body:
## Commands and Perms
- /r and /reply
- /hat: `pebbles.command.hat`
- /heal <optionalname>: `pebbles.command.heal.self` and `pebbles.command.heal.other`
- /feed <optionalname> `pebbles.command.feed.self` and `pebbles.command.feed.other`
- /feedall: `pebbles.command.feedall`
- /repair: `pebbles.command.repair`
- /repairall: `pebbles.command.repairall`
- /smelt: `pebbles.command.smelt`
- /smeltall: `pebbles.command.smeltall`
- /clearinventory <optionalname>: `pebbles.command.clearinventory.self` and `pebbles.command.clearinventory.others`

Will be adding cooldown for some of the commands next update
